requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Mongolian Energy Programmes vs Mandatory Minimum Efficacy
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——蒙古能源计划 vs 强制最低能效
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——蒙古能源計劃 vs 強制最低能效

summary.en: Mongolia addresses lighting energy efficiency primarily through national energy-efficiency programmes and policy measures rather than a single binding minimum-efficacy regulation analogous to the EU Ecodesign Regulation. Energy-efficient lighting promotion in Mongolia has historically been pursued through state energy-conservation programmes and standards developed under MASM, which may adopt IEC/regional performance standards as MNS where applicable. As of this review, there is no confirmed single mandatory minimum lm/W threshold uniformly enforced as a market-entry barrier for all LED lamps in the way the EU enforces Ecodesign. Manufacturers should verify whether a current Mongolian energy-efficiency programme, MNS performance standard, or procurement/labelling requirement applies to the specific product, and what minimum performance (if any) is required.
summary.zh: 蒙古主要通过国家能效计划和政策措施处理照明能效，而非类似欧盟生态设计法规的单一具约束力最低能效法规。蒙古的节能照明推广历来通过国家节能计划及在 MASM 下制定的标准推进，在适用时可将 IEC/区域性能标准采纳为 MNS。截至本次审阅，尚无确认的、像欧盟执行生态设计那样对所有 LED 灯统一作为市场准入门槛执行的单一强制最低 lm/W 阈值。制造商应核实是否有现行蒙古能效计划、MNS 性能标准或采购/标识要求适用于特定产品，以及（如有）所要求的最低性能。
summary.zht: 蒙古主要通過國家能效計劃和政策措施處理照明能效，而非類似歐盟生態設計法規的單一具約束力最低能效法規。蒙古的節能照明推廣歷來通過國家節能計劃及在 MASM 下制定的標準推進，在適用時可將 IEC/區域性能標準採納為 MNS。截至本次審閱，尚無確認的、像歐盟執行生態設計那樣對所有 LED 燈統一作為市場准入門檻執行的單一強制最低 lm/W 閾值。製造商應核實是否有現行蒙古能效計劃、MNS 性能標準或採購/標識要求適用於特定產品，以及（如有）所要求的最低性能。

standards_or_laws: Mongolian national energy-efficiency programmes / energy-conservation policy (lighting efficiency promotion)
MNS performance standards for LED lighting (where adopted under MASM)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), which defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest) ≥90 lm/W; Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W; Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W. Grade 3 is the minimum required for market entry in China, and China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products (administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP). China therefore enforces a binding minimum efficacy and a mandatory energy label — a more prescriptive baseline than Mongolia's programme-based approach.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）≥90 lm/W；2 级 ≥80 lm/W；3 级 ≥70 lm/W。3 级为中国市场准入最低要求，且中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求（由 SAMR/CQC/CECP 管理）。因此中国执行具约束力的最低能效及强制性能效标识——较蒙古基于计划的方式更具规定性。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）≥90 lm/W；2 級 ≥80 lm/W；3 級 ≥70 lm/W。3 級為中國市場准入最低要求，且中國能效標識（CEL）註冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求（由 SAMR/CQC/CECP 管理）。因此中國執行具約束力的最低能效及強制性能效標識——較蒙古基於計劃的方式更具規定性。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: The direction of the gap is the reverse of the EU case: China enforces a binding minimum efficacy (GB 30255 Grade 3, ≥70 lm/W) plus a mandatory energy label, whereas Mongolia generally relies on energy-efficiency programmes and policy rather than a single uniformly-enforced minimum-efficacy market barrier. A product already meeting China's Grade 3 (or better) baseline is likely to meet or exceed typical Mongolian energy-efficiency expectations, so energy performance is rarely the limiting factor for a China-to-Mongolia export. The key actions are to confirm: (1) whether any current Mongolian energy programme, MNS performance standard, or government-procurement requirement imposes a minimum efficacy for the product type; (2) whether energy-performance documentation must be submitted as part of MASM certification or importer registration. Verify current programme scope with MASM, as energy-efficiency policy can change.
gap.zh: 差距方向与欧盟情形相反：中国执行具约束力的最低能效（GB 30255 三级，≥70 lm/W）加强制能效标识，而蒙古一般依靠能效计划和政策，而非单一统一执行的最低能效市场门槛。已达到中国 3 级（或更优）基线的产品很可能满足或超过蒙古典型能效预期，故对中蒙出口而言能效很少成为限制因素。关键行动是确认：（1）是否有现行蒙古能源计划、MNS 性能标准或政府采购要求对该产品类型规定最低能效；（2）能效性能文件是否须作为 MASM 认证或进口商登记的一部分提交。请向 MASM 核实现行计划范围，因能效政策可能变化。
gap.zht: 差距方向與歐盟情形相反：中國執行具約束力的最低能效（GB 30255 三級，≥70 lm/W）加強制能效標識，而蒙古一般依靠能效計劃和政策，而非單一統一執行的最低能效市場門檻。已達到中國 3 級（或更優）基線的產品很可能滿足或超過蒙古典型能效預期，故對中蒙出口而言能效很少成為限制因素。關鍵行動是確認：（1）是否有現行蒙古能源計劃、MNS 性能標準或政府採購要求對該產品類型規定最低能效；（2）能效性能文件是否須作為 MASM 認證或進口商登記的一部分提交。請向 MASM 核實現行計劃範圍，因能效政策可能變化。

mandatory_status.target: Programme-based / verify — Mongolia addresses lighting efficiency mainly via energy-efficiency programmes and policy; no single uniformly-enforced minimum-efficacy market barrier confirmed. Verify current programme/MNS performance requirements with MASM
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mongolia generally addresses LED lighting energy efficiency through national energy-efficiency programmes and policy rather than a single binding minimum-efficacy regulation like the EU. A product meeting China's GB 30255 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) or better is likely to meet typical Mongolian expectations, so energy performance is rarely the limiting factor. Verify with MASM whether any current programme, MNS performance standard, or procurement requirement imposes a minimum efficacy or energy-documentation requirement for the specific product before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古一般通过国家能效计划和政策处理 LED 照明能效，而非欧盟式单一具约束力最低能效法规。达到中国 GB 30255 三级（≥70 lm/W）或更优的产品很可能满足蒙古典型预期，故能效很少成为限制因素。出货前请向 MASM 核实是否有现行计划、MNS 性能标准或采购要求对特定产品规定最低能效或能效文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古一般通過國家能效計劃和政策處理 LED 照明能效，而非歐盟式單一具約束力最低能效法規。達到中國 GB 30255 三級（≥70 lm/W）或更優的產品很可能滿足蒙古典型預期，故能效很少成為限制因素。出貨前請向 MASM 核實是否有現行計劃、MNS 性能標準或採購要求對特定產品規定最低能效或能效文件要求。

requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances — No Horizontal RoHS in Mongolia (vs EU RoHS / China RoHS)
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质——蒙古无横向 RoHS（vs 欧盟 RoHS / 中国 RoHS）
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質——蒙古無橫向 RoHS（vs 歐盟 RoHS / 中國 RoHS）

summary.en: Mongolia does not operate a horizontal RoHS-type restriction of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment equivalent to the EU RoHS Directive. Importantly, Mongolia is NOT a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU), so the EAEU Technical Regulations (including EAEU TR on the restriction of hazardous substances) do not apply to products placed on the Mongolian market. As a result, there is generally no mandatory 10-substance (or 6-substance) homogeneous-material restriction enforced as a condition of market access for LED luminaires in Mongolia. General product-safety and any applicable chemical/environmental rules may still apply, and individual MNS or procurement specifications could reference substance limits — verify the specific product and current Mongolian requirements with MASM and the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 蒙古不实行相当于欧盟 RoHS 指令的、针对电气电子设备有害物质的横向 RoHS 类限制。重要的是，蒙古并非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，故 EAEU 技术法规（包括关于限制有害物质的 EAEU 技术法规）不适用于投放蒙古市场的产品。因此，蒙古一般不存在作为 LED 灯具市场准入条件而强制执行的 10 项（或 6 项）均质材料物质限制。一般产品安全及任何适用的化学品/环境规则仍可能适用，个别 MNS 或采购规范也可能引用物质限值——请与 MASM 及在地进口商核实特定产品及现行蒙古要求。
summary.zht: 蒙古不實行相當於歐盟 RoHS 指令的、針對電氣電子設備有害物質的橫向 RoHS 類限制。重要的是，蒙古並非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，故 EAEU 技術法規（包括關於限制有害物質的 EAEU 技術法規）不適用於投放蒙古市場的產品。因此，蒙古一般不存在作為 LED 燈具市場准入條件而強制執行的 10 項（或 6 項）均質材料物質限制。一般產品安全及任何適用的化學品/環境規則仍可能適用，個別 MNS 或採購規範也可能引用物質限值——請與 MASM 及在地進口商核實特定產品及現行蒙古要求。

standards_or_laws: Mongolia — no horizontal RoHS-type hazardous-substance restriction for EEE (national regime; NOT an EAEU member, so EAEU TR does not apply)
General product-safety and applicable chemical/environmental rules (verify per product with MASM / importer)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with the same concentration thresholds as EU RoHS. China RoHS 2 (Management Measures, SJ/T 11364-2014) requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange/green) on EEE sold in China. China therefore has a disclosure-based hazardous-substance regime, which is more developed than Mongolia's (where no horizontal RoHS-type restriction applies).
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同。中国 RoHS 2（管理办法，SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 产品上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙/绿）。因此中国实行基于披露的有害物质制度，较蒙古（不实行横向 RoHS 类限制）更为完善。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同。中國 RoHS 2（管理辦法，SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 產品上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙/綠）。因此中國實行基於披露的有害物質制度，較蒙古（不實行橫向 RoHS 類限制）更為完善。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Unlike the EU (which adds 4 phthalates and restricts 10 substances) or even China's disclosure regime, Mongolia has no horizontal RoHS-type restriction as a market-access condition — and because Mongolia is NOT an EAEU member, the EAEU hazardous-substance technical regulation does not apply either. The practical effect is that a Chinese manufacturer's existing GB/T 26572 compliance and China RoHS 2 disclosure are generally more than adequate from a substance-restriction standpoint for Mongolia, and no additional phthalate testing is mandated for market access. Cautions: (1) this does not remove general product-safety obligations; (2) specific MNS standards, government-procurement specs, or contractual buyer requirements could still reference substance limits — verify per product; (3) if the same product is also destined for the EU or an EAEU market, the stricter EU RoHS / EAEU TR requirements would apply for those markets, not Mongolia. Confirm current Mongolian requirements with MASM and the importer.
gap.zh: 与欧盟（新增 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯、限制 10 项物质）甚至中国披露制度不同，蒙古不将横向 RoHS 类限制作为市场准入条件——且因蒙古并非 EAEU 成员，EAEU 有害物质技术法规亦不适用。实际效果是：从物质限制角度看，中国制造商现有的 GB/T 26572 合规及中国 RoHS 2 披露对蒙古而言通常绰绰有余，且市场准入不强制额外的邻苯二甲酸酯检测。注意事项：（1）这不免除一般产品安全义务；（2）特定 MNS 标准、政府采购规范或买方合同要求仍可能引用物质限值——须按产品核实；（3）若同一产品同时销往欧盟或 EAEU 市场，则该等市场（而非蒙古）适用更严格的欧盟 RoHS / EAEU 技术法规要求。请与 MASM 及进口商确认现行蒙古要求。
gap.zht: 與歐盟（新增 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯、限制 10 項物質）甚至中國披露制度不同，蒙古不將橫向 RoHS 類限制作為市場准入條件——且因蒙古並非 EAEU 成員，EAEU 有害物質技術法規亦不適用。實際效果是：從物質限制角度看，中國製造商現有的 GB/T 26572 合規及中國 RoHS 2 披露對蒙古而言通常綽綽有餘，且市場准入不強制額外的鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測。注意事項：（1）這不免除一般產品安全義務；（2）特定 MNS 標準、政府採購規範或買方合同要求仍可能引用物質限值——須按產品核實；（3）若同一產品同時銷往歐盟或 EAEU 市場，則該等市場（而非蒙古）適用更嚴格的歐盟 RoHS / EAEU 技術法規要求。請與 MASM 及進口商確認現行蒙古要求。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Mongolia has no horizontal RoHS-type hazardous-substance restriction as a market-access condition; NOT an EAEU member, so EAEU TR does not apply. General product-safety and any product-specific substance references still apply — verify per product
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mongolia has no horizontal RoHS-type hazardous-substance restriction as a condition of market access, and because Mongolia is NOT an EAEU member, the EAEU hazardous-substance technical regulation does not apply either. A Chinese manufacturer's existing GB/T 26572 compliance and China RoHS 2 disclosure are generally more than adequate for Mongolia on substance restriction, with no mandated additional phthalate testing for access. General product-safety obligations remain, and specific MNS/procurement specs could still reference substance limits — verify per product with MASM and the importer. Stricter EU RoHS / EAEU TR rules would apply only to those other markets, not Mongolia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古不将横向 RoHS 类有害物质限制作为市场准入条件，且因蒙古并非 EAEU 成员，EAEU 有害物质技术法规亦不适用。从物质限制角度看，中国制造商现有的 GB/T 26572 合规及中国 RoHS 2 披露对蒙古通常绰绰有余，市场准入不强制额外的邻苯二甲酸酯检测。一般产品安全义务仍然存在，特定 MNS/采购规范仍可能引用物质限值——请与 MASM 及进口商按产品核实。更严格的欧盟 RoHS / EAEU 技术法规仅适用于该等其他市场，而非蒙古。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古不將橫向 RoHS 類有害物質限制作為市場准入條件，且因蒙古並非 EAEU 成員，EAEU 有害物質技術法規亦不適用。從物質限制角度看，中國製造商現有的 GB/T 26572 合規及中國 RoHS 2 披露對蒙古通常綽綽有餘，市場准入不強制額外的鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測。一般產品安全義務仍然存在，特定 MNS/採購規範仍可能引用物質限值——請與 MASM 及進口商按產品核實。更嚴格的歐盟 RoHS / EAEU 技術法規僅適用於該等其他市場，而非蒙古。
